ALL PROJECTS

Here you can find the list of all my projects. Feel free to explore and see what I have been working on.

Menu Master Restaurant Management System

This cross-platform web-based application is designed to streamline restaurant operations, from managing ingredient inventory and menu items to employee scheduling and more.

ReactRustMongoDBRocket
Visit Repo

Gran Turismo 7 Race Tracker

Start your engines! Using Python, this companion desktop application was created to help gamers track their laps in Gran Turismo 7. The player can select their desired racing map to record their best lap times and compare against other players on the leaderboard.

PythonFlaskSQLite
Visit Repo

Tic-Tac-Toe AI MiniMax

Want to play? Grab a friend for a round of Tic-Tac-Toe, or challenge our AI! Built with JavaFX and powered by the Minimax algorithm, our AI will keep you on your toes.

JavaAIJavaFXMinimax
Visit Repo

JavaFX Programming Quiz Game

This JavaFX application delivers an engaging quiz experience. Users can take quizzes, view their scores, and check the current leaderboard, all stored and managed through a text file.

JavaFXCRUDJava
Visit Repo

Airport Flight System Application

Ready for take-off? Using C# and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), this flight management system allows you to book, view and cancel your flights. Additionally, it uses CRUD operations for efficient user and flight data management.

C#ASP.NETData StructuresCRUD
Visit Repo

Weather App with React

Stay updated with the latest weather information! This React application fetches real-time weather data using the OpenWeatherMap API and displays it in a user-friendly interface.

ReactAxiosOpenWeatherMap API
Visit Repo

SpaceX Launch Tracker with Angular

Blast off with this Angular application! Users can view upcoming SpaceX launches, as well as details about past launches, all fetched from the SpaceX API.

AngularSpaceX APIBootstrap
Visit Repo

Employee-Management-System-MERN

Manage employees, departments, and roles with ease using this MERN stack application. It features a user-friendly interface and a secure login system, ensuring seamless access to employee data.

ReactNode.jsExpressMongoDB
Visit Repo
